---
title: "Future Hydropower — Major Basin Capacity Bubbles"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
  pdf:
    fig-width: 10
    fig-height: 3
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.width = 10, fig.height = 3, dpi = 150)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(readxl)
library(scales)
```

```{r load}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
# FHReD future dams (same as 14/17; use sheet 2 if sheet 1 is intro)
xl_path <- here("data/FHReD_2015_future_dams_Zarfl_et_al_beta_version/FHReD_2015_future_dams_Zarfl_et_al_beta_version.xlsx")
future <- read_xlsx(xl_path, sheet = 2)

future_geo <- future %>%
  filter(!is.na(`Capacity (MW)`), !is.na(LAT_cleaned), !is.na(Lon_Cleaned)) %>%
  mutate(
    basin = coalesce(`Major Basin`, "Other")
  )

# Basin-level totals (MW) and top basins, matching 17's ordering
basin_mw <- future_geo %>%
  group_by(basin) %>%
  summarise(basin_mw_total = sum(`Capacity (MW)`), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(basin_mw_total)) %>%
  mutate(
    rank = row_number(),
    basin_ranked = if_else(rank <= 10,
                           paste0(rank, ". ", basin),
                           "Other basins")
  )

basin_top10 <- basin_mw %>%
  filter(rank <= 10) %>%
  mutate(
    basin_group = basin_ranked,
    basin_group = factor(
      basin_group,
      levels = paste0(1:10, ". ", basin_mw$basin[1:10])
    ),
    # Tighter horizontal spacing (allow slight overlap)
    x_pos = seq(1, by = 0.85, length.out = n())
  )

# Palette: same as 17 (top 10 basins + grey for others)
pal_basin10 <- c(
  RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(10, "Paired"),
  "#666666"
)
```

```{r bubbles}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
ggplot(
  basin_top10,
  aes(
    x = x_pos,
    y = 0.9,
    size = basin_mw_total,
    fill = basin_group
  )
) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, color = "#222222", alpha = 0.95, stroke = 0.4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal_basin10[1:10], guide = "none") +
  scale_size_continuous(
    range = c(8, 30),
    labels = comma,
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = basin_top10$x_pos,
    labels = as.character(basin_top10$basin_group),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.01))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.6), clip = "off") +
  labs(
    title = "Future hydropower capacity in the top 10 river basins",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 2)),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 8, r = 20, b = 8, l = 8)
  )
```
